title: Mechanically Challenged
description: Level up your skills to unlock tools and blocks to survive! Explore the vast number of new biomes and build amazing machinery from Create in the amazing mountain ranges or valleys of Tectonic!
body:
**Mechnically Challenged** is exactly how it sounds: a modpack focused on the machinery and factory-building of the amazing Create mod paired with the challenge of having to unlock tools, blocks, workstations, and resources through various skills. Perfect for players who want more depth and difficulty than vanilla Minecraft can offer, while not going overboard with the amount of technology or other content mods. ## ⭐ Pack Highlights ⚙️ Build the factory of your dreams using [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) to automate crafting, farming, or resource gathering.
🏔️ Enjoy stunning new terrain generation thanks to [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) and [Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria)
📦 Store ALL the things with [Extended Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-drawers), [Iron Chests: Restocked](https://modrinth.com/mod/ironchests), [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage), and [Inmis](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis)
⚔️ Fight new mobs and increase your skill level with [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz), [AdventureZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/adventurez), and [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords)
🪙 Engage in a new world economy powered by [Numismatic Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatic-overhaul) and [Jobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/jobsaddon)
... and much more! ## ⚠️ Reporting Issues Any issues with the modpack can be reported over on the [Github Issues Page](https://github.com/GamerBah/Mechanically-Challenged/issues). ## 🗒️Other Information This pack is listed at around 300 mods. While many performance mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) are present, your performance may vary based on your system. For users with an NVIDIA GPU, [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) is included for best possible performance at higher render distances. [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined), as well as some additional resource packs, are enabled by default. For best performance, I recommend using 8GB of memory with Java 21 and the following Java arguments:
Spoiler -XX:+UseShenandoahGC -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+UseStringDeduplication -Dfml.ignorePatchDiscrepancies=true -Dfml.ignoreInvalidMinecraftCertificates=true -XX:-OmitStackTraceInFastThrow -XX:+OptimizeStringConcat -Dfml.readTimeout=180 -XX:+UseLargePages
